title: oxalis obtusa
intro: Oxalis obtusa, also known as the False Sorrel or Wood Sorrel, is a perennial plant that belongs to the wood sorrel family and is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Oxalis obtusa include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and provide relief from skin irritations and wounds. Oxalis obtusa can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
